title: Diamond Seed
description: A mod that adds Diamond Seeds that can be planted and harvested to get diamonds.
body:
A unique Minecraft mod that introduces Diamond Seeds, allowing players to grow diamonds through farming. 

![diamond seed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e898cfac99628b7eb81fc3b8aaaf4c1a19c93764.jpeg)

When breaking Diamond Ore, there's a 10% chance to obtain a Diamond Seed that can be planted directly on stone blocks. 

Once the crop matures through 8 growth stages, harvesting yields 1-2 diamonds and returns the seed for continuous farming. 

The mod includes a special achievement "Diamond Farmer" that rewards players with 50 experience points upon their first harvest. 

This makes diamond farming an exciting and renewable resource mechanic in your Minecraft world.
